name: Turon
description: Crispy golden spring rolls filled with sweet saba bananas and caramelized jackfruit, coated in crunchy caramelized sugar.

name: Kutsinta
description: Soft and chewy steamed rice cakes with a rich brown sugar flavor, traditionally topped with freshly grated coconut.

name: Karioka
description: Sweet and chewy glutinous rice balls coated in caramelized sugar and served on skewers for a classic Filipino snack.

name: Leche Flan
description: A rich and creamy Filipino custard dessert topped with smooth golden caramel for a perfectly indulgent treat.

name: Ensaymada
description: Soft and fluffy Filipino sweet bread topped with butter, sugar, and grated cheese for the perfect balance of sweet and savory.

name: Ensaymada Party Tray
description: A tray of soft and buttery ensaymada topped with sugar and cheese, made for sharing with family and friends.

name: Biko
description: Sticky rice delicacy cooked in creamy coconut milk and brown sugar, finished with a sweet latik topping.

name: Biko Platter
description: A party-sized platter of rich and sticky coconut rice cakes topped with sweet latik, perfect for sharing at gatherings.

name: Cassava Cake Platter
description: Creamy and moist cassava cake baked with coconut milk and topped with a sweet custard layer for a delightful Filipino favorite.

name: Kakanin Platter
description: An assorted platter of beloved Filipino rice delicacies and native sweets, perfect for celebrations and merienda.
